zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde De Bethune於1217年出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Guillaume de Béthune III15歲，母親Elisabeth de Pontrohart13歲。她於1237年5月17日與Jean de Lille II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde De Bethune于1217年出生在艾歐洛时，她的父亲Guillaume de Béthune III15岁，母亲Elisabeth de Pontrohart13岁。她于1237年5月17日与Jean de Lille II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde De Bethune was born in 1217, in Europe, her father, Guillaume de Béthune III, was 15 and her mother, Elisabeth de Pontrohart, was 13. She married Jean de Lille II on 17 May 1237. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1264, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde De Bethune est née en 1217, à Europe, son père, Guillaume de Béthune III, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Pontrohart, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Lille II le 17 mai 1237. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1264, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde De Bethune 1217 in Europa geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Béthune III 15 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Pontrohart 13. Sie hat am 17. Mai 1237 Jean de Lille II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Bethune è nata il nel 1217 nel Europa, sua padre, Guillaume de Béthune III, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Pontrohart, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Lille II il 17 maggio 1237. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1264, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Bethuneが1217年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Béthune IIIは15歳，母Elisabeth de Pontrohartは13歳であった。1237年5月17日にJean de Lille IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Bethune(이)가 1217년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Béthune III(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Pontrohart(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1237년 5월 17일 Jean de Lille II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Bethune nasceu em 1217, em Europa, seu pai, Guillaume de Béthune III, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Pontrohart, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Lille II em 17 de maio de 1237. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1264, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde De Bethune родилась в 1217 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Béthune III было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Pontrohart, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Lille II 17 мая 1237 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1264 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde De Bethune nació en 1217, en Europa, su papá, Guillaume de Béthune III, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Pontrohart, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Jean de Lille II el 17 de mayo de 1237. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1264, a la edad de 47 años.
